author: lOrm
content: Fixed: atomic check+reserve. Hold the shells Mutex across GC sweep, capacity check, spawn() syscall, and insert — single contiguous critical section. Pre-fix flow: spawn() -> lock -> check -> reject (leaked orphan child). Post-fix flow: lock -> sweep -> check -> spawn -> insert -> drop. Cap=50, spawn is a fast fork+exec, contention is bounded. Stress tests: fix672_concurrent_spawn_never_exceeds_cap fires 62 concurrent spawners on a barrier; asserts successes <= cap AND cap-rejection path is reachable. fix672_manager_map_size_bounded_by_cap_under_load polls the internal map during the race window and asserts max_seen <= cap.
